caption: The video features an elderly man with white hair tied back, wearing glasses and a blue patterned shirt, standing at a podium in front of an audience. He appears to be giving a speech or presentation at the Kellogg-Hubbard Library, as indicated by the sign on the podium. The setting is indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows behind him. The man is speaking into a microphone, gesturing slightly with his hands, and seems engaged with his audience. The atmosphere suggests a formal event, possibly a lecture or community gathering, with attendees seated and attentively listening. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating the source or affiliation of the video.
